zh.lifeSummary: 當Anna Barbara Stober於1711年11月3日出生在巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧斯塔福特時，她的父親Hanß Peter Stober28歲，母親Anna Catharina Elisabetha Mueller30歲。她於1730年7月4日與Hans Valentin Kieffer在巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧布藍肯洛結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1773年在德國海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 盧德維格沙阿分拉海姆 貝 福藍肯塔爾拉海姆享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anna Barbara Stober于1711年11月3日出生在巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧斯塔福特时，她的父亲Hanß Peter Stober28岁，母亲Anna Catharina Elisabetha Mueller30岁。她于1730年7月4日与Hans Valentin Kieffer在巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧布藍肯洛结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1773年在德国海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 盧德維格沙阿分拉海姆 貝 福藍肯塔爾拉海姆享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stober
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German (also Stöber): from Middle High German stöuber ‘hunting dog’, for a hunter or for a curious, restless person.

Germanized form of Sorbian Stobor: from the Old Sorbian personal name Stobor, derived from the imperative stoj ‘stand, stay’ (later interpreted as if derived from sto ‘hundred’) + the element bor ‘to fight’.

variants.name: Stoeber
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Willi.

variants.name: Stoebner
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Darrold, Helmuth.
German (also Stöbner): variant of Stöber (see Stober ). The surname Stoebner or Stöbner is very rare in Germany.

variants.name: Stover
meanings: North German (Stöver): from Middle Low German (bad)stover ‘bather, barber, worker at a public bathhouse’, mainly an occupational name, but occasionally perhaps a nickname for a dedicated bather. Compare Stoever .
English: variant of   Stopher   with intervocalic voicing of /f/ to /v/.

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

nameMeanings.name: Barbara
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin, meaning ‘foreign woman’ (a feminine form of barbarus ‘foreign’, from Greek, referring originally to the unintelligible chatter of foreigners, which sounded to the Greek ear like no more than bar-bar). St Barbara has always been one of the most popular saints in the calendar, although there is some doubt whether she ever actually existed. According to legend, she was imprisoned in a tower and later murdered by her father, who was then struck down by a bolt of lightning. Accordingly, she is the patron of architects, stonemasons, and fortifications, and of firework makers, artillerymen, and gunpowder magazines.

variants.name: Barbra
meanings: From Latin, meaning ‘foreign woman’ (a feminine form of barbarus ‘foreign’, from Greek, referring originally to the unintelligible chatter of foreigners, which sounded to the Greek ear like no more than bar-bar). St Barbara has always been one of the most popular saints in the calendar, although there is some doubt whether she ever actually existed. According to legend, she was imprisoned in a tower and later murdered by her father, who was then struck down by a bolt of lightning. Accordingly, she is the patron of architects, stonemasons, and fortifications, and of firework makers, artillerymen, and gunpowder magazines.

en.lifeSummary: When Anna Barbara Stober was born on 3 November 1711, in Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, her father, Hanß Peter Stober, was 28 and her mother, Anna Catharina Elisabetha Mueller, was 30. She married Hans Valentin Kieffer on 4 July 1730, in Blankenloch, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. She died about 1773, in Heuchelheim, Heuchelheim bei Frankenthal, Ludwigshafen, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anna Barbara Stober est née le 3 novembre 1711, à Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, son père, Hanß Peter Stober, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Anna Catharina Elisabetha Mueller, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Hans Valentin Kieffer le 4 juillet 1730, à Blankenloch, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1773, à Heuchelheim, Heuchelheim bei Frankenthal, Landkreis Ludwigshafen, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anna Barbara Stober am 3. November 1711 in Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hanß Peter Stober 28 und ihre Mutter Anna Catharina Elisabetha Mueller 30. Sie hat am 4. Juli 1730 in Blankenloch, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden Hans Valentin Kieffer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb um 1773 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Heuchelheim, Heuchelheim bei Frankenthal, Landkreis Ludwigshafen, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anna Barbara Stober è nata il il 3 novembre 1711 nel Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, sua padre, Hanß Peter Stober, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Anna Catharina Elisabetha Mueller, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Hans Valentin Kieffer il 4 luglio 1730, nel Blankenloch, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 4 figlie. Morì circa 1773, nel Heuchelheim, Heuchelheim bei Frankenthal, Landkreis Ludwigshafen, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Anna Barbara Stoberが1711年11月3日にバデンベズイルクサムト カルルスルヘスタフォートで生まれた時，父Hanß Peter Stoberは28歳，母Anna Catharina Elisabetha Muellerは30歳であった。1730年7月4日にバデンベズイルクサムト カルルスルヘブランケンロチでHans Valentin Kiefferと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1773年にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズランドクレイス ルドウィグシャフンヘウチェルヘイム ベイ フランケンサルヘウチェルヘイムで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anna Barbara Stober(이)가 1711년 11월 3일 바든 베지르크샘트 칼스루헤 스태포트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hanß Peter Stober(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anna Catharina Elisabetha Mueller(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1730년 7월 4일 바든 베지르크샘트 칼스루헤 블랭켄럭에서 Hans Valentin Kieffer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1773년 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 랜드크레이스 루드위그샤펜 헤우헬하임 브이 프랭켄솔 헤우헬하임에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anna Barbara Stober nasceu em 3 de novembro de 1711, em Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, seu pai, Hanß Peter Stober, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Anna Catharina Elisabetha Mueller, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Hans Valentin Kieffer em 4 de julho de 1730, em Blankenloch, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1773, em Heuchelheim, Heuchelheim bei Frankenthal, Landkreis Ludwigshafen, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anna Barbara Stober родилась 3 ноября 1711 г. в местности стаффорт, безирксэмт карлсрух, баден, её отцу по имени Hanß Peter Stober было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Anna Catharina Elisabetha Mueller, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hans Valentin Kieffer 4 июля 1730 г. в местности бланкенлоч, безирксэмт карлсрух, баден. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла около 1773 г. в местности хеучелхим, хеучелхим би фрэнкэнтэл, ландкрис лудвигшафен, раинланд-пфалз, Германия в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anna Barbara Stober nació el 3 de noviembre de 1711, en Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, su papá, Hanß Peter Stober, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Anna Catharina Elisabetha Mueller, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Hans Valentin Kieffer el 4 de julio de 1730, en Blankenloch, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1773, en Heuchelheim, Heuchelheim bei Frankenthal, Landkreis Ludwigshafen, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania, a la edad de 63 años.
